title: Quezon City, Metro Manila — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Quezon City, Metro Manila: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Quezon City is a city in Metro Manila with a population of 2,960,000. The Philippines’ most populous city, a sprawling urban center with universities, entertainment hubs, and a vibrant food scene.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
